lineup_source: France vs Senegal, Group I, 16 June 2026 (4-2-3-1)

players.name: Mike Maignan
players.note: Born in Cayenne, French Guiana, to a Guadeloupean father and a Haitian mother (from Aquin).

players.name: Jules Koundé
players.note: Born in Paris to a Beninese father (François) and a French mother (Élisabeth); holds French and Beninese citizenship.

players.name: William Saliba
players.note: Born in Bondy, Seine-Saint-Denis, to a Lebanese father and a Cameroonian mother.

players.name: Dayot Upamecano
players.note: Born in Évreux; parents from Guinea-Bissau and Senegal ('His mother is Senegalese').

players.name: Théo Hernandez
players.note: Born in Marseille; father Jean-François Hernández was a French footballer (of Spanish descent). Raised partly in Spain.

players.name: Adrien Rabiot
players.note: Born in Saint-Maurice into a French footballing family (mother Véronique, father Alain, both French players).

players.name: Aurélien Tchouaméni
players.note: Born in Rouen; of Cameroonian descent through both parents.

players.name: Michael Olise
players.note: Born in London to a British-Nigerian father and a Franco-Algerian mother. 'I come from four countries: France, Algeria, Nigeria and England.'

players.name: Désiré Doué
players.note: Born in Angers to an Ivorian father and a French mother; holds French and Ivorian citizenship.

players.name: Kylian Mbappé
players.note: Born in Paris; father from the Cameroonian island of Djébalè, mother of Algerian Kabyle origin.

players.name: Ousmane Dembélé
players.note: Born in Vernon; Malian father, Mauritanian-Senegalese mother (from Waly Diantang).
